pi_items.source: 4StoreyBuilding.inp file contains 20 PSZ systems with naming convention matching Ground (G), Middle (M), Top (T), and Basement (B) floors

Task description states 'Change the Cooling Sizing Ratio (COOL-SIZING-RATI) for these perimeter systems to 1.0 (removing the safety factor)'. Default COOL-SIZING-RATI for PSZ systems is 1.15 (DOE-2.2/ASHRAE 90.1 standard), so changing to 1.0 removes the 15% safety factor. Verifier checks for values 0.99-1.01.

Grep analysis of 4StoreyBuilding.inp identifies 12 perimeter systems: G.S11, G.E12, G.N13, G.W14 (Ground floor), M.S21, M.E22, M.N23, M.W24 (Middle floor), T.S31, T.E32, T.N33, T.W34 (Top floor). These match regex pattern [._](S|E|N|W)\d+ used by verifier.py lines 74-75.

Grep analysis of 4StoreyBuilding.inp identifies 3 core systems on primary floors (G, M, T): G.C15, M.C25, T.C35. These match regex pattern [._](C|Core)\d* used by verifier.py line 72. (Note: 5 additional basement core systems exist (B.C1-B.C5) but task description only mentions Ground, Middle, Top floors.)

DOE-2.2 simulations generate .sim output files. eQUEST documentation and export_result.ps1 scripts (cool_roof_economizer_package) confirm .sim files are created in the project directory. The naming convention follows the project name (4StoreyBuilding.sim for 4StoreyBuilding project).

privileged_info_summary: The 4StoreyBuilding model is a real, multi-storey commercial building model from official DOE-2 training workbook examples (doe2.com). It contains exactly 12 perimeter HVAC systems (4 per floor on Ground, Middle, Top floors with South, East, North, West orientations) and 3 core systems on the same three floors. The task requires changing the COOL-SIZING-RATI parameter from the default value of 1.15 to 1.0 (removing the 15% safety factor) for perimeter systems only, while preserving core and heating systems unchanged. The simulation output is saved as 4StoreyBuilding.sim in the project directory.
